w:r.w:t: L will call the Pupils for putting things properly in proper racks. She will place note books, books, work books and PDP books, lunch box, napkins etc. (Make sure that on daily basis they should put their lunch boxes in racks and fold their napkins properly)
IL will show pictures of (pg#48) and Pupils will learn the names.
Pupils will tell about their favorite vegetables.
IL will explain the activities, and after that they will do their work independently on booklet.
page #44. IL will mention the day and date on top of the page and check at the end
Food of the week is Tomato
IL to do a 5 min warm up with the pupils.
Q.1: Where was Allama Iqbal born? Ans:
Allama Iqbal was born in Sialkot.
Q.1: Which Eid comes after Ramadan??
Tomato, Potato, Carrot, Radish and Onion
